name: quantum-ec-add
description: Optimize the qubit-toffoli product for a reversible circuit that adds a quantum elliptic curve point to a classical elliptic curve point.
setupCommand: command -v cargo >/dev/null || curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal; . "$HOME/.cargo/env" 2>/dev/null || true; command -v gcc >/dev/null || dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make; command -v gcc >/dev/null; cargo fetch
benchmarkCommand: . "$HOME/.cargo/env" 2>/dev/null || true; command -v gcc >/dev/null || { dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make || sudo dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make; }; command -v gcc >/dev/null; RUSTFLAGS='-C linker=gcc' cargo run --release --bin experiment
